task: Build a backend for a todo application with JWT authentication, PostgreSQL and CRUD endpoints for tasks.
Build a FastAPI backend for a note-taking service with PostgreSQL, user registration and login, and CRUD endpoints for notes with ownership checks.
Build a FastAPI backend for an inventory management system with PostgreSQL, product CRUD, stock update endpoints, and simple role-based access for admin and employee users.
Build a FastAPI backend for a blog platform with PostgreSQL, JWT authentication, CRUD endpoints for posts, and comment creation and listing endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for an event management system with PostgreSQL, user authentication, event CRUD, and attendee registration endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for a habit tracker with PostgreSQL, JWT authentication, CRUD endpoints for habits, and daily completion tracking.
Build a FastAPI backend for a bookstore service with PostgreSQL, CRUD endpoints for books, author management, and search by title or author.
Build a FastAPI backend for a task assignment platform with PostgreSQL, user authentication, project CRUD, and task assignment endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for a support ticket system with PostgreSQL, JWT authentication, ticket creation, status updates, and agent assignment endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for a recipe manager with PostgreSQL, user authentication, CRUD endpoints for recipes, and ingredient-based filtering.
Build a FastAPI backend for a course management system with PostgreSQL, teacher and student authentication, course CRUD, and enrollment endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for an issue tracker with PostgreSQL, JWT authentication, issue CRUD, label management, and issue status transitions.
Build a FastAPI backend for a movie watchlist application with PostgreSQL, user authentication, CRUD endpoints for watchlists, and movie rating support.
Build a FastAPI backend for a library management system with PostgreSQL, book CRUD, borrower records, and checkout and return endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for a fitness coaching platform with PostgreSQL, JWT authentication, workout plan CRUD, and progress logging endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for a small CRM with PostgreSQL, user authentication, customer CRUD, and interaction history endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for a hotel booking service with PostgreSQL, room CRUD, reservation endpoints, and availability checks.
Build a FastAPI backend for a subscription billing dashboard with PostgreSQL, user authentication, plan CRUD, and subscription lifecycle endpoints.
Build a FastAPI backend for a warehouse transfer system with PostgreSQL, product and warehouse CRUD, and stock transfer endpoints with validation.
Build a FastAPI backend for a volunteering platform with PostgreSQL, user authentication, opportunity CRUD, and volunteer signup endpoints.
